headlines.summary: Africa's biggest refinery has started pricing fuel in U.S. dollars because Nigeria can't supply enough Nigerian crude to keep it running. headlines.summary: Renewed U.S.-Iran hostilities have pushed Brent above $85, ending the oversupply narrative and reviving fears of a global oil shortage.
